name: Kung Fury: Street Rage - Ultimate Edition
short_description: The original epic introduction to the eternal KUNG FURY beat ‘em up saga. New stages, and the Hackademy. Both THE ARCADE STRIKES BACK and the A DAY AT THE BEACH campaign.
detailed_description:
It's finally here, KUNG FURY: STREET RAGE - ULTIMATE EDITION.

A BRAND NEW HT-3000 CARTRIDGE GAME PACKED WITH:

* ENDLESS ARCADE-STYLE BEAT ‘EM UP NAZI FIGHTS
* STEREO SOUND MUSIC INSPIRED BY UP ‘N’ COMING HIT ARTIST DAVID HASSELHOFF
* STATE OF THE ART TRUE COLOR GRAPHICS
* PRO TIPS FROM HACKERMAN IN THE HACKADEMY PRACTICE MODE
* EVEN MORE NAZI ENEMIES TO BEAT

GET BLOWN INTO ANOTHER DIMENSION AS YOU EXPERIENCE THE GUT-BUSTING FUN WITH THE KUNG FURY GAME. COMBINE THE UNIQUE COMBAT STYLES OF:

* BARBARIANNA
* HACKERMAN
* TRICERACOP
* DAVID HASSELHOFF
* AND OF COURSE KUNG FURY HIMSELF

HAND OUT FREE KNUCKLE SANDWICHES IN UNFORGETTABLE STAGES:

* BACK ALLEY
* DREAMWORLD
* SEWERS
* VIKING AGE
* THE BEACH

BEAT THE NAZIS TO STOP KUNG FÜHRER AND UPHOLD THE LAW!

BECOME THE ACTION! BE. KUNG. FURY!!!!

DISCLAIMER:
*** NOT ENOUGH NAZIS WERE HARMED IN THE MAKING OF THIS GAME ***
